Parameters.Name: ListUnits
Parameters.Description: List active systemctl units

Parameters.Name: ListAutoMounts
Parameters.Description: List automount units currently in memory

Parameters.Name: ListSockets
Parameters.Description: List socket units currently in memory

Parameters.Name: ListTimers
Parameters.Description: List timer units currently in memory

Parameters.Name: Show
Parameters.Description: Show properties of the system

Parameters.Name: Status
Parameters.Description: The overall status or the status of the unit

Parameters.Name: All
Parameters.Description: Give all output

Parameters.Name: Help
Parameters.Description: Show help

Parameters.Name: Now
Parameters.Description: Do the action now, dont wait for reload

Parameters.Name: Failed
Parameters.Description: Any failed units

Parameters.Name: Start
Parameters.Description: Start the specified unit

Parameters.Name: Stop
Parameters.Description: Stop the specified unit

Parameters.Name: Restart
Parameters.Description: Restart the specified unit

Parameters.Name: Reload
Parameters.Description: Reload the configuration of the specified unit

Parameters.Name: Enable
Parameters.Description: Enable the specified unit to start at boot

Parameters.Name: Disable
Parameters.Description: Disable the specified unit from starting at boot

Parameters.Name: Mask
Parameters.Description: Mask the specified unit to prevent it from being started

Parameters.Name: Unmask
Parameters.Description: Unmask the specified unit to allow it to be started

Parameters.Name: DaemonReload
Parameters.Description: Reload systemd manager configuration

Parameters.Name: IsActive
Parameters.Description: Check if the specified unit is active

Parameters.Name: IsEnabled
Parameters.Description: Check if the specified unit is enabled
